title: har3nz's Better Waypoints
description: This project is a waypoint mod specifically for hoplite but can be used everywhere it automatically makes a waypoint for you at 0,65,0 and makes a waypoint when there's a supply drop nearby waypoints show distance waypoint name and highlights the blocks
body: This project is a waypoint mod specifically for hoplite, but can be used everywhere. It automatically makes a waypoint for you at 0,0 and makes a waypoint when there's a supply drop nearby. Waypoints show distance, waypoint name and highlights the blocks. U can also make not 1 block but waypoints for big areas!
